label: Transparent hibiscus flower motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hibiscus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete hibiscus flower motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A tropical garden hibiscus flower with scarlet red petals, a yellow stamen, dark green leaves, subtle coral petal transitions, and crisp botanical detail. No cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete flower cutout with petals, stamen, and leaves visible without cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no rose, no camellia, no vase, no hand, no props, no beach landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hibiscus light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Hibiscus, derived from the visible hibiscus flower cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished bold resort-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hibiscus, Hibiscus Flower, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract scarlet petals, yellow stamen focus, dark-green leaf navigation, tropical sand surfaces, coral activity states, and resort hospitality contrast for bookings, guest operations, venue dashboards, and bold product screens.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, booking cards, guest tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic red UI, no unrelated neon colors, no beach stock art, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Hibiscus.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hibiscus dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Hibiscus that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hibiscus, Hibiscus Flower, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve scarlet actions, yellow focus rings, dark tropical green surfaces, resort-ivory foregrounds, coral states, and bold hospitality workflow coverage.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no beach stock art, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Hibiscus.
